Name: MenuPropertyLayoutParam
Description: Determines layout parameters relating to menu elements.

Fields.Name: Layout Path
Fields.Description: The layout path for this element.

Fields.Name: Menu Property ID
Fields.Description: The menu property to link to this element.

Fields.Name: Caption Text ID
Fields.Description: If a valid text ID is set, this will be displayed in preference to the property name.

Fields.Name: Help Text ID
Fields.Description: Only if this is a valid text ID will it be selectable in the field help.

Fields.Name: Display Conditions
Fields.Description: The display conditions for this element.
